zh.lifeSummary: 當Reverend John Woodbridge於1492年出生在英國維爾爾斯坦頓 聖 昆丁時，他的父親John Woodbridge19歲，母親Mrs John Woodbridge14歲。他於大約1524年與Grace Stalebras在英國英格蘭維爾爾斯坦頓 聖 昆丁結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Woodbridge
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Woodbridge in Suffolk or Dorset, both named from Old English wudu ‘wood’ + brycg ‘bridge’ (i.e. a bridge made of timber or one near a wood), or a topographic name denoting a person who lived by a wooden bridge or a bridge in or near a wood, from Middle English wode ‘wood’ + brigge ‘bridge’ (Old English wudu + brycg).
History: John Woodbridge (1613–95), emigrated in 1634 from Stanton in Wiltshire, England, to Newbury, MA, where he was pastor and magistrate.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Reverend John Woodbridge was born in 1492, in Stanton St Quintin, Wiltshire, England, his father, John Woodbridge, was 19 and his mother, Mrs John Woodbridge, was 14. He married Grace Stalebras about 1524, in Stanton Saint Quintin, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son.

ko.lifeSummary: Reverend John Woodbridge(이)가 1492년 영국 윌츠히르 스탠턴 스트 퀸틴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Woodbridge(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs John Woodbridge(은)는 14세였다. 그는 대략 1524년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 스탠턴 세인트 퀸틴에서 Grace Stalebras(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Reverend John Woodbridge родился в 1492 г. в местности стантон ст куинтинь, уилцхир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Woodbridge было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs John Woodbridge, 14. Он женился на женщине по имени Grace Stalebras около 1524 г. в местности стантон сеинт куинтинь, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын.
